programs.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programs.desc: Dave has 17 huge, painful head bumps; Melissa recently moved to a new town but her mysterious red, scaly lesions cover her legs; Glamorous dermatologist Dr. Shearer Seymour shadows Dr. Lee as they attempt to remove a pointy cyst from Sam's cheek.

programs.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programs.desc: Dave is a firefighter and avid cyclist whose bump gets in the way of wearing various helmets; Bree empowers others on social media by accepting her own psoriasis, but it has recently become too painful to endure.

programs.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programs.desc: Dee has the voice of an angel, but her huge neck hump has stolen her passion to sing; Eli wants to be a chef, but feels ashamed of his cheek bump; Dr. Zoe assists Dr. Lee to remove Showta's many boba-shaped bumps.

programs.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programs.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programs.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programs.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programs.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programs.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.
